body: [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by GetResponse."}], "data-id": "this-add-on-was-built-by-getresponse"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://www.getresponse.com/?utm_source=neto", "children": [{"text": "Visit Add-On Website"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For support with this add-on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.getresponse.com/features/support", "children": [{"text": "contact GetResponse"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The GetResponse email marketing and online campaign management platform helps marketers build targeted subscriber lists and send high-impact newsletters and follow-up campaigns. It offers marketing automation, responsive email design, hundreds of ready-to-use email templates, landing page creator, and detailed statistics."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "GetResponse are also proud to be a spam-free solution, achieving a consistent deliverability rate of over 99%, the highest deliverability rate in the industry."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up GetResponse"}], "data-id": "set-up-getresponse"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please follow the instructions GetResponse have provided in their "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.getresponse.com/help/integrations-and-api/can-i-add-neto-customers-and-prospects-to-my-contact-list.html", "children": [{"text": "integration article"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]
